title: Fragile object
description: Action likely to damage fragile entities such as glass, ceramics, or electronics.

title: Heat source proximity
description: End-effector proximity or contact with dangerous heat sources (stove, oven, iron).

title: Forbidden region
description: Workspace or semantic zone violation — the robot must not enter this area.

title: Liquid near electrical
description: Hazardous combination: pouring or spilling liquid near electrical outlets or devices.

title: Human proximity
description: Fast or forceful motion while a human is within the safety perimeter.

title: Sharp object handling
description: Manipulating knives, scissors, or other sharp objects toward a person or fragile surface.
